result.stderr:
HtmlArk - Pack a web page into a single HTML file 1.6.0+401a2d81.401a2d81a01313c82dc8aa5490d2593fb870301a
Copyright (c) 2020-2023 Alessio Parma <alessio.parma@gmail.com>

  -M, --http-client-max-resource-size    How many bytes can be downloaded for
                                         each resource.

  -T, --http-client-timeout              Timeout of the internal HTTP client.

  -A, --ignore-audios                    Ignores audios during archival.

  -C, --ignore-css                       Ignores style sheets during archival.

  -E, --ignore-errors                    Ignores unreadable resources.

  -F, --ignore-fonts                     Ignores fonts during archival.

  -I, --ignore-images                    Ignores images during archival.

  -J, --ignore-js                        Ignores external JavaScript during
                                         archival.

  -V, --ignore-videos                    Ignores videos during archival.

  -m, --minify                           Minifies output HTML.

  -o, --output                           Output HTML file path. If not
                                         specified, output will be written to
                                         STDOUT.

  -v, --verbose                          Prints detailed information during HTML
                                         archival.

  --help                                 Display this help screen.

  --version                              Display version information.

  input (pos. 0)                         Required. Input HTML URI or HTML file
                                         path.
